title: 'Draconian development' in Meta-Manus deal draws the line in China's AI race with the U.S.
summary_full: Beijing's decision to block Meta's acquisition of Manus is a warning to other startups thinking of relocating data, talent and intellectual property abroad.
summary_public: Beijing's decision to block Meta's acquisition of Manus is a warning to other startups thinking of relocating data, talent and intellectual property abroad.
